setupGuide.notes: Placeholder for Autodromo Internazionale del Mugello - 59 laps / 309.455 km reproduced as 60 laps. Both are fast, flowing permanent road courses; the Nürburgring GP loop keeps Mugello's high-speed sweeping character.

Placeholder for Sochi Autodrom - 53 laps / 309.745 km reproduced as 66 laps. Sochi's smooth low-grip 90-degree layout is stood in by the modern Barcelona GP circuit, a wide permanent-facility Grade-1 venue.

Placeholder for Autódromo Internacional do Algarve - 66 laps / 306.826 km reproduced as 73 laps. Portimão is stood in by Estoril, the era-closest Portuguese permanent circuit, preserving the undulating Iberian road-course character.
Placeholder for Istanbul Park - 58 laps / 309.396 km reproduced as 60 laps. Istanbul Park's long multi-apex corners are stood in by the modern Nürburgring GP loop, a wide permanent Grade-1 venue.

Placeholder for Bahrain International Circuit - 57 laps / 308.238 km reproduced as 66 laps. Bahrain is stood in by the modern Barcelona GP circuit, a wide permanent Grade-1 venue with a comparable technical-and-straight balance.

Placeholder for Bahrain International Circuit (Outer) - 87 laps / 307.995 km reproduced as 66 laps. The one-off Bahrain Outer layout is stood in by the modern Barcelona GP circuit, a wide permanent Grade-1 venue.

Placeholder for Yas Marina Circuit - 55 laps / 305.355 km reproduced as 65 laps. Yas Marina is stood in by the modern Barcelona GP circuit, a wide permanent Grade-1 venue with a similar mix of long straights and technical sections.
